user.title: Set up HASS Console
user.description: Tell HASS Console where to find your console.yaml and where to write the CSV log files. The console.yaml file must already exist — see the README for the format. The CSV files will be created automatically on first run.

error.yaml_not_found: Console YAML file not found at the given path
error.parent_not_writable: Parent directory does not exist and could not be created

abort.single_instance_allowed: HASS Console is already configured. Only one instance is supported.

init.title: HASS Console settings
init.description: Change file paths. Changes apply immediately — no restart needed.

error.yaml_not_found: Console YAML file not found at the given path
error.parent_not_writable: Parent directory does not exist and could not be created
